name: Acroterion ornament
description: Triple-tall accent spire on the roof apex (Greek-style acroterion).
python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.roof_acroterion.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
style_affinity: Greco-Roman / Classical motif. Coherent in renaissance/mediterranean (and some modern). Out of place in East-Asian, Gothic, medieval, rustic buildings.
